---
name: Bug or idea
about: A verdict that read wrong, a research miss, or an improvement
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

**What happened**
The idea you ran (or a made-up one that reproduces it), and the verdict you got.

**What you expected**
What a good, honest verdict would have said instead.

**Which part**
If you can tell, which file or step seems responsible (research, a member, the courtroom, the
judge, the wording of the output).

> Please don't paste anything private. Your local ledger stays local for a reason.
